expectations.text: Recommends a focused set of metrics rather than an exhaustive dump
expectations.evidence: Four outcome metrics, explicitly 'focused', not an ESP-report dump.

expectations.text: Distinguishes meaningful outcome metrics from vanity metrics (e.g. opens) explicitly
expectations.evidence: Separate 'ones that matter' vs 'watch, don't optimize' sections; opens flagged as vanity.

expectations.text: Includes an explicit warning against optimizing for vanity metrics
expectations.evidence: 'Don't chase them at the expense of clicks, conversions, and retention.'

expectations.text: Notes that attribution is imperfect or that the metrics are directional
expectations.evidence: Dedicated attribution caveat: 'treat these numbers as directional'.

expectations.text: Ties at least one metric to a downstream business goal
expectations.evidence: Conversion/newsletter-attributed qualified leads tied to revenue/retention goal.
